description: M-26-14 Element 1: Detects agent-type coverage drops vs. rolling baseline (low_count per agent.type, 1h)

detectors.detector_description: Anomalously low count of assets reporting by agent type

custom_settings.m_26_14_requirement: Element 1 — Inventory Visibility | Appendix B §4 CDM/HWAM Coverage Verification
custom_settings.m_26_14_acceptance_criteria: Fires when >=20% of previously-logging assets go silent for >=2 consecutive 1h buckets. FP rate for normal maintenance windows <10% after 14-day baseline.
custom_settings.m_26_14_description: M-26-14 Element 1: Detects anomalous drops in the count of distinct assets reporting logs vs. rolling baseline. An asset coverage degradation signal — indicates agents going offline, network segmentation failures, or unauthorized decommissioning not recorded in HWAM. M-26-14 Appendix B §4 (CDM/HWAM coverage). Required for Element 1 L3+ compliance health monitoring.
